records.m_Talk_ENG: As much as I hate to admit it, we're too worn out to be of any use to your fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not useless. I never thought that for a second...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not useless. I never thought that for a second...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not useless. I never thought that for a second...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be the ones protecting you!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Because my soldiers are risking their lives to protect me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because my soldiers are risking their lives to protect me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I trust them, so there's nothing for me to fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I trust them, so there's nothing for me to fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I trust them, so there's nothing for me to fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Forgive me. I've been so hard on myself, I didn't realize I was worrying you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's not just me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's not just me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... As much as I hate to admit it, she might be right.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We were trying to look all cool, and now Captain's covering for us? That's kinda awkward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. I'll do everything I can to help Captain maintain her best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. I'll do everything I can to help Captain maintain her best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. I'll do everything I can to help Captain maintain her best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure no one gets hurt, so you don't have to overdo it, Captain!

records.m_Talk_FRA: A-Arius?! What are you doing here? It's dangerous!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's suffered because of me. I don't want to just be protected anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's suffered because of me. I don't want to just be protected anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's suffered because of me. I don't want to just be protected anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I vow! To echo our pride across this battlefield with belief in our comrade's victory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now go, Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now go, Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now go, Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like always, the Order will be your shield.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like always, the Order will be your shield.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like always, the Order will be your shield.
